## Pull Request

**What does this PR add or change?**

<!-- Describe the entry/entries you're adding or the change you're making -->

**Checklist:**

- [ ] I have read the [contribution guidelines](../contributing.md).
- [ ] The entry uses the format: `- [Name](link) - Description.`
- [ ] The description starts with a capital letter and ends with a period.
- [ ] The project is actively maintained and related to the Nickel configuration language.
- [ ] I searched existing entries to avoid duplicates.
- [ ] The entry is added to the correct section in alphabetical order.
